tour.moreHint: On mobile you'll find this under the “More” menu.

welcome.title: Welcome to NinerLog, {{name}}! 👋
welcome.body: Let's take a quick tour so you know exactly where everything lives. It only takes a minute — and you can skip it any time.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.body: This is your home base. Once you start logging flights you'll see your totals, currency status and recent activity here at a glance.

aircraft.title: Add your aircraft
aircraft.body: Start by adding the aircraft you fly. Registration, type and class are reused every time you log a flight, so you only enter them once.

licenses.title: Add your licenses
licenses.body: Add your pilot licenses (PPL, SPL, CPL, ATPL, IR…). NinerLog uses them to tailor your flight log and currency rules to each authority.

credentials.title: Store your credentials
credentials.body: Keep medicals, ratings and other certificates here. We'll watch their expiry dates and warn you before anything lapses.

addFlight.title: Log a flight
addFlight.body: This is the quickest way to add a flight. Pick your aircraft, enter your off-block and on-block times, airports and landings — that's it.

flights.title: Find your flights
flights.body: Every flight you log lives here. Browse, search and tap any entry to view or edit the full details.

currency.title: Stay current
currency.body: Track your recency at a glance — like 3 takeoffs and landings in 90 days — so you always know when you're legal to fly.

finish.title: You're ready to fly! ✈️
finish.body: That's the tour. The best first step is adding an aircraft and logging your first flight. You can replay this tour any time from the Help page.
